explanations.1: This checks if a variable called APP_ENV equals the string 'production' — it's a conditional statement specific to Makefiles.
explanations.2: When in production, CMD is set to empty, meaning commands will run directly on the host instead of inside a Docker container.
explanations.4: When not in production, CMD is set to this prefix so that any command that uses $(CMD) will execute inside the Docker container instead.
